medialive.channel.statickeysettings.CfnA:
The static key settings.

The parent of this entity is KeyProviderSettings.

medialive.channel.statickeysettings.KeyP.Description: The URL of the license server that is used for protecting content.

medialive.channel.statickeysettings.Stat.Description: The static key value as a 32 character hexadecimal string.
